inputs: JavaScript/MJS tests importing node:test or using simple CommonJS require("node:test") plus simple node:assert/strict assertions; simple literal CommonJS requires are converted to ESM and .js-to-.mjs renames are reported via renameToMjs

entries.rollbackNote: Runner/API migration only; rerun without --write for review, keep unhandled report, and revert the changed test files if Vitest parity regresses
